text: TCS Q3 net profit rose 11% YoY to Rs 12,380 crore, beating street estimates on strong BFSI demand.
summary: TCS Q3 profit rose 11% YoY beating estimates on BFSI strength.

text: Reliance Industries shares fell 3% after the company reported weaker-than-expected refining margins.
summary: Reliance shares fell 3% on weak refining margins.

text: Infosys maintained its FY revenue guidance at 1-3% in constant currency, unchanged from prior quarter.
summary: Infosys kept FY revenue guidance unchanged at 1-3%.

text: HDFC Bank reported a 20% jump in quarterly net profit, driven by higher net interest income.
summary: HDFC Bank Q profit jumped 20% on higher net interest income.

text: Adani Ports stock slid 4% amid concerns over rising debt levels flagged by analysts.
summary: Adani Ports fell 4% on analyst debt concerns.

text: Nifty 50 closed flat at 22,150 as gains in IT offset losses in metal stocks.
summary: Nifty closed flat as IT gains offset metal losses.

text: Tata Motors reported record domestic sales in March, up 18% over the prior year.
summary: Tata Motors March domestic sales hit record, up 18% YoY.

text: Wipro missed Q4 revenue estimates and guided to a muted first quarter, sending shares lower.
summary: Wipro missed Q4 estimates and gave weak guidance, shares fell.

text: SBI announced its board will meet next week to consider fundraising via bonds.
summary: SBI board to meet next week on bond fundraising.

text: Bajaj Finance reported strong AUM growth of 34% YoY, lifting the stock to a record high.
summary: Bajaj Finance stock hit record on 34% AUM growth.
